pr.title: sobjlib: decompile SObj setup and render paths
pr.author: itsgrimetime

summary: PR #2485 decompiled two SObj setup/render-related functions to claimed 100% match, added a 99.88707% near-match for the main SObj render path, typed SObj descriptor/color data needed by those implementations, and made small GX SDK header/source type adjustments to support texture format use.

key_files.role: Main implementation: replaces stubs for HSD_SObjLib_803A477C and HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68, updates HSD_SObjLib_803A55DC matching tactic, adds SObj constants and includes.
evidence_refs: diff: HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68 implementation added with PAD_STACK(0x20)
diff: HSD_SObjLib_803A55DC far_val changed to volatile const f32 load

key_files.role: Header typing for SObj descriptor/color structures and declarations used by the new implementations.
evidence_refs: pr_body: Add SObj descriptor/color typing used by the new implementations
diff_excerpt: include style changed from quoted dolphin/gx/GXStruct.h to angle include <dolphin/gx/GXStruct.h>

key_files.role: Small related baselib texture-object adjustment; exact diff body not loaded.
GX texture format enum cleanup: CI texture formats folded into GXTexFmt by removing separate GXCITexFmt typedef.
evidence_refs: diff: GX_TF_C4/GX_TF_C8/GX_TF_C14X2 moved under GXTexFmt; GXCITexFmt typedef removed

key_files.role: Prototype update for GXInitTexObjCI format parameter from GXCITexFmt to GXTexFmt.
evidence_refs: diff: GXInitTexObjCI signature changed to GXTexFmt format

key_files.role: Implementation signature kept consistent with GXTexture.h after GXInitTexObjCI type change.
evidence_refs: diff: GXInitTexObjCI definition changed to GXTexFmt format

what_changed.text: Implemented HSD_SObjLib_803A477C, including SObj allocation, texture/TLUT initialization, optional secondary texture setup, default field initialization, texture coordinate scaling, and insertion via HSD_SObjLib_803A44D4.

Implemented HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68 as a large render path near-match, including GX state setup, TLUT/texture loading, TEV setup by flags and texture format, quad coordinate generation using sinf/cosf, and state cleanup.
evidence_refs: pr_body: Add a near-match for HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68 at 99.88707%

what_changed.text: Changed HSD_SObjLib_803A55DC far_val from a direct 2.0f literal to a volatile const f32 load from HSD_SObjLib_804DEA98, with PR body claiming the function reached 100%.
Added SObj-related constants HSD_SObjLib_804DEA80 through HSD_SObjLib_804DEA98 in sobjlib.c, replacing a data_pad_jumptable placeholder.
Adjusted GX SDK texture format typing so GXInitTexObjCI accepts GXTexFmt and CI texture format enumerants are part of GXTexFmt rather than a separate GXCITexFmt.
evidence_refs: diff: GXTexture.h and GXTexture.c GXInitTexObjCI format parameter changed to GXTexFmt

what_changed.text: Added extern/.clang-format to disable formatting and include sorting in extern code.
evidence_refs: diff: extern/.clang-format added with DisableFormat true and SortIncludes false

smart_moves.text: The PR body records narrow verification for a matching PR: formatting on touched baselib files, configure+ninja in the dev worktree, a targeted sobjlib.o build, and objdiff percentages for each claimed function plus data sections.
Header and SDK source signatures were updated together for GXInitTexObjCI, avoiding a prototype/body mismatch after the enum type change.
evidence_refs: diff: GXTexture.h GXInitTexObjCI changed to GXTexFmt
diff: GXTexture.c GXInitTexObjCI changed to GXTexFmt

smart_moves.text: The render implementation uses a switch on GX texture formats rather than an opaque branch ladder for TEV setup, making the recovered control flow searchable and reviewable.
evidence_refs: diff: switch (tex_fmt) with GX_TF_I4, GX_TF_I8, GX_TF_IA4, GX_TF_IA8, GX_TF_RGB565, GX_TF_RGB5A3, GX_TF_RGBA8, GX_TF_C4, GX_TF_C8, GX_TF_C14X2, GX_TF_CMPR

decomp_lessons.lesson: When decompiling GX texture code, verify SDK enum/prototype typing if a callsite naturally passes a wider texture-format enum; here GXInitTexObjCI and the CI texture constants were changed to use GXTexFmt consistently.
evidence_refs: diff: GXInitTexObjCI signature changed in GXTexture.h and GXTexture.c
diff: HSD_SObjLib_803A477C calls GXInitTexObjCI with image->format

decomp_lessons.lesson: For setup functions that allocate and initialize runtime objects, descriptor typing can unlock clean field-based code: HSD_SObjLib_803A477C uses HSD_SObjDesc, HSD_ImageDesc, and HSD_Tlut fields rather than raw offset access.
evidence_refs: pr_body: Add SObj descriptor/color typing used by the new implementations
diff: HSD_SObjLib_803A477C uses desc->image, desc->tlut, desc->image2, image->width, image->height, tlut->tlut_name

decomp_lessons.lesson: Near-match render code may still be useful when isolated and explicitly reported with objdiff percentage; the PR keeps HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68 as a named 99.88707% near-match rather than claiming full match.
evidence_refs: pr_body: Add a near-match for HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68 at 99.88707%
text_corpus bot report: HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68 improved from 0.00% to 99.89%

naming_conventions.convention: Address-style HSD_SObjLib_* names were retained for functions and data constants where semantic names were not established in the loaded PR evidence.
evidence_refs: diff: function and data names remain address-style

naming_conventions.convention: Short local role names were used where roles are directly visible: image, image2, tlut, sobj, obj_width, obj_height, tex_fmt, origin_x, origin_y.
Typed color aliases were added/used for SObj byte fields where the diff shows color access, e.g. x38_color and x3C_color, while nearby raw field names remain for less-proven fields.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: PAD_STACK(0x20) was used in the 99.88707% near-match render function HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: Loaded evidence shows the tactic and objdiff percentage, but no review discussion explains why the padding is necessary.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: A volatile const f32 load from HSD_SObjLib_804DEA98 was used for far_val in HSD_SObjLib_803A55DC, replacing a direct 2.0f literal.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: This is an explicit matching tactic involving volatile and named data; evidence supports that it was used and claimed matched, but not the full rationale.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Removed prior near-match TODO comments once the PR claimed the affected functions were matched or improved.
evidence_refs: diff: duplicate @todo 99.56% match comments removed above HSD_SObjLib_803A44D4
diff: @todo 99.84% match comment removed above HSD_SObjLib_803A55DC
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: The loaded PR body does not claim HSD_SObjLib_803A44D4 was newly matched in this PR, so do not infer a new match for that function.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Data placeholder removal and explicit constants were used to get reported data sections to 100%.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: Treat as PR-local evidence, not as a general endorsement of adding named constants for data order without ownership evidence.

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.text: Report showed matched code increased by 612 bytes and matched data by 304 bytes; four new matches included HSD_SObjLib_803A477C and sobjlib .data/.sdata2/.sdata, plus HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68 improved from 0.00% to 99.89%.
No human review comments or review records were present in the loaded slice.

notes: Strong evidence exists for PR identity, changed files, stated verification, claimed match percentages, and the main sobjlib.c/GX diffs shown in the excerpt.
The raw diff is truncated, so exact sobjlib.h and tobj.c changes are only partially visible; do not infer detailed header field layouts or tobj.c behavior beyond the PR summary and file metadata.
No human review comments were loaded, so reviewer intent and acceptance rationale are unavailable.
The PR body reports successful local and targeted builds plus objdiff results, but this intake did not independently run tools or validate them.

accepted_candidate_records.title: PR-local use of volatile const float load for HSD_SObjLib_803A55DC
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2485, HSD_SObjLib_803A55DC reached a claimed 100% objdiff after far_val was changed from a direct 2.0f literal to *(volatile const f32*) &HSD_SObjLib_804DEA98. This is a narrow observation for sobjlib, not a global style rule.
evidence_refs: diff: far_val volatile const f32 load

accepted_candidate_records.title: SObj setup decomp used descriptor and color typing
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2485 reports adding SObj descriptor/color typing used by new implementations; the diff shows HSD_SObjLib_803A477C accessing desc->image, desc->tlut, desc->image2, image dimensions, mipmap, and tlut fields directly.

source_update_candidates.title: sobjlib.c contains SObj setup/render decomp work with GX texture and TEV state paths
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2485 is evidence that src/sysdolphin/baselib/sobjlib.c owns HSD_SObjLib_803A477C setup logic, HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68 render logic, and HSD_SObjLib_803A55DC projection/camera setup work, with GX texture, TLUT, TEV, Z texture, and vertex quad emission calls involved.
evidence_refs: pr_title: sobjlib: decompile SObj setup and render paths
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful path-scoped search fact for future SObj/GX render decomp work; curator should verify against current source before promotion.

source_update_candidates.title: GXInitTexObjCI signature was changed to GXTexFmt in extern Dolphin GX
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2485 changed GXInitTexObjCI in both extern/dolphin/include/dolphin/gx/GXTexture.h and extern/dolphin/src/dolphin/gx/GXTexture.c to take GXTexFmt instead of GXCITexFmt, and folded GX_TF_C4/GX_TF_C8/GX_TF_C14X2 into GXTexFmt in GXEnum.h.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential SDK path fact; curator should verify this remains true in current source.

source_update_candidates.title: Do not generalize volatile literal loads from isolated matching wins
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2485 contains a successful claimed use of a volatile const f32 load for one function, but loaded evidence does not explain the rationale. If standards are updated, frame this only as a tactic requiring narrow objdiff evidence, not as normal style.
evidence_refs: diff: HSD_SObjLib_803A55DC far_val volatile const f32 load
source_update_candidates.reason: Current standards already cover this generally; candidate is only to add an example if curator wants PR-backed examples.

rejection_notes: Do not promote PAD_STACK(0x20) as an accepted general tactic from this PR alone; evidence shows use in a near-match but not why it was required.
Do not claim HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68 was fully matched; the PR body and bot report identify it as 99.88707%/99.89%.
Do not infer detailed sobjlib.h field layout or tobj.c behavior from this slice because the relevant diff content is truncated or absent.
Do not infer human reviewer approval rationale; no human review comments were loaded.
